---
title: "Lab 2 - TOH WEN QIAN"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

# About Me
I'm currently studying Applied AI in Singapore Institute of Technology
Im interested in:
- AI & Machine Learning
- UI/UX
- Business & Branding

![](sit.jpg)

# Contact
Email: 2503151@sit.singaporetech.edu.sg
